We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abia, Akwa Ibom, Cross River, Kaduna, Kano, Lagos, Plateau and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Applicant must possess a Degree in Pharmacy or in any other science related course and must have flair for marketing.
	Applicant must have all the basic experiences in sales and marketing.
	Applicant must have good knowledge in the use of MS Office.
	Applicant must be highly motivated and target driven with a proven track record in sales.
	Applicant must have good communication and organisational skills.
	Applicant must have ability to create and deliver presentations tailored to the audience need.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should farward CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@altinezgroup.com&nbsp;using &quot;Medical Sales Representative&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Applicants are further required to indictate the best choice of location on the body of the mail.",

Medical Sales Representative Job at Al-tinez Pharmaceuticals Limited




        
    

        
        Al-tinez Pharmaceuticals Limited is an indigenous private limited liability company that is a foremost player in the Importation, Sales and Marketing of high quality Pharmaceuticals and Allied Products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative

Job Locations: Abia, Akwa Ibom, Cross River, Kaduna, Kano, Lagos, Plateau and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Applicant must possess a Degree in Pharmacy or in any other science related course and must have flair for marketing.
	Applicant must have all the basic experiences in sales and marketing.
	Applicant must have good knowledge in the use of MS Office.
	Applicant must be highly motivated and target driven with a proven track record in sales.
	Applicant must have good communication and organisational skills.
	Applicant must have ability to create and deliver presentations tailored to the audience need.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should farward CV to: [email protected] using "Medical Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.

Note: Applicants are further required to indictate the best choice of location on the body of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance & Inventory Manager",
  "description": "Auldon Limited is a toy trading company strategically located in the commercial centre of idumota Lagos Nigeria, it is a wholesale distribution organization servicing major departmental stores, Multi-National Organizations and educational institutions within Nigeria and its sub-region. Founded as Arigold Toys in 1996 before transforming into a limited liability company, with the registration RC-439491 and named auldon limited in the year 2002.

Auldon limited is famously known internationally for pioneering the African Themed Unity Girls Dolls, a collection of 14-inch dolls, each representing Nigeria&rsquo;s three major tribes which promotes cultural inclusion amongst Africans and her diaspora communities. The product is being created to deliver an empowering social message to girls around Nigeria and the world at large.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance &amp; Inventory Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description&nbsp;


	We are currently recruiting for a Finance and Inventory Manager to oversee thefinancial operations and inventory control of our retail store.
	The goal is to enable thecompany&rsquo;s leaders to make sound business decisions and meet the company&rsquo;s objectives.
	In this role, you will have the opportunity to utilize your expertise in financial analysis andstrategic planning. By analyzing day-to-day financial activities with precision, you will provide valuable insights and recommendations to upper management.
	Your guidance will empower the company&rsquo;s leaders to make informed decisions that align with theorganization&rsquo;s long-term goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Analyze daily sales reports and financial statements for trends and discrepancies.
	Prepare and present financial performance reports to senior management
	Oversee operations of the finance department, set goals and objectives, anddesign a framework for these to be met.
	Oversee inventory management and stock control processes
	Minimize stock loss and ensure accurate inventory records
	Ensuring all finance and accounting operations comply with generally acceptedaccounting principles and federal and state laws and regulations.
	Ensuring day-to-day transactions such as accounts payable, cash receipts andaccounts receivable, credit card transactions, and payroll are recordedproperly.
	Performing fiscal year-end close activities and assisting with activities and&nbsp;requirements of external auditors.
	Review and approve expenditure requests within designated limits.
	Oversee reconciliation of general ledger accounts and bank statements


Required Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in a finance or accounting role, with at least 2 yearsin a managerial position.
	Proven experience in retail finance or a similar industry.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting, budgeting, and forecasting.
	Experience in cash flow management and financial modeling.
	Familiarity with accounting software and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.
	Ability to prepare and present comprehensive financial reports to senior management.
	Strong understanding of inventory management and cost-reduction strategies.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel.
	Experience in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Familiarity with tax filing requirements and coordination with tax advisors
	Certified Accountant (CPA), Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), or ICAN is compulsory.


Salary
N400,000 - N450,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Operations@auldontoys.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Auldon Limited"
    
  },

Finance & Inventory Manager Job at Auldon Limited




        
    

        
        Auldon Limited is a toy trading company strategically located in the commercial centre of idumota Lagos Nigeria, it is a wholesale distribution organization servicing major departmental stores, Multi-National Organizations and educational institutions within Nigeria and its sub-region. Founded as Arigold Toys in 1996 before transforming into a limited liability company, with the registration RC-439491 and named auldon limited in the year 2002.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Auldon limited is famously known internationally for pioneering the African Themed Unity Girls Dolls, a collection of 14-inch dolls, each representing Nigeria’s three major tribes which promotes cultural inclusion amongst Africans and her diaspora communities. The product is being created to deliver an empowering social message to girls around Nigeria and the world at large.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance & Inventory Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description 


	We are currently recruiting for a Finance and Inventory Manager to oversee thefinancial operations and inventory control of our retail store.
	The goal is to enable thecompany’s leaders to make sound business decisions and meet the company’s objectives.
	In this role, you will have the opportunity to utilize your expertise in financial analysis andstrategic planning. By analyzing day-to-day financial activities with precision, you will provide valuable insights and recommendations to upper management.
	Your guidance will empower the company’s leaders to make informed decisions that align with theorganization’s long-term goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Analyze daily sales reports and financial statements for trends and discrepancies.
	Prepare and present financial performance reports to senior management
	Oversee operations of the finance department, set goals and objectives, anddesign a framework for these to be met.
	Oversee inventory management and stock control processes
	Minimize stock loss and ensure accurate inventory records
	Ensuring all finance and accounting operations comply with generally acceptedaccounting principles and federal and state laws and regulations.
	Ensuring day-to-day transactions such as accounts payable, cash receipts andaccounts receivable, credit card transactions, and payroll are recordedproperly.
	Performing fiscal year-end close activities and assisting with activities and requirements of external auditors.
	Review and approve expenditure requests within designated limits.
	Oversee reconciliation of general ledger accounts and bank statements


Required Skills


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in a finance or accounting role, with at least 2 yearsin a managerial position.
	Proven experience in retail finance or a similar industry.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting, budgeting, and forecasting.
	Experience in cash flow management and financial modeling.
	Familiarity with accounting software and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.
	Ability to prepare and present comprehensive financial reports to senior management.
	Strong understanding of inventory management and cost-reduction strategies.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel.
	Experience in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Familiarity with tax filing requirements and coordination with tax advisors
	Certified Accountant (CPA), Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), or ICAN is compulsory.


Salary
N400,000 - N450,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Ambiance Cafeteria has been in business for years and has grown into a premier name in the hospitality industry, offering a seamless blend of comfort, entertainment, and culinary excellence. what began as a single hospitality venture has evolved into a dynamic enterprise comprising a luxury hotel, a vibrant nightclub, an upscale restaurant, and a selection of stylishbars. With a commitment to outstanding guest experiences, Ambiance Cafeteria has consistently set new standards in service, ambiance, and innovation. Each facet of the business reflects a dedication to quality, from the refined accomodations of our hotel to the immersive atmosphere of our nightlife venues and the exceptional cuisine served in our restaurant. Over the years,&nbsp; Ambiance Cafeteria&nbsp;has become a preferred destination for both local and international guests, earning a reputation for excellence and reliability in the hospitality sector. Our continued growth is driven by passion for hospitality and a vision to create memorable experiences for every guest.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support&nbsp;Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented IT Support Specialist with 2&ndash;4 years of hands-on experience, particularly within a hospitality environment.
	The ideal candidate will have strong problem-solving abilities, a customer-focused mindset, and experience supporting IT systems in hotels, or similar service-driven settings.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide first- and second-line technical support for hardware, software, and network-related issues
	Maintain and troubleshoot Property Management Systems (PMS), POS systems, and guest-facing technologies
	Support IT infrastructure including servers, workstations, printers, and network devices
	Ensure minimal downtime of IT systems critical to hotel operations
	Assist in system upgrades, installations, and configurations
	Monitor system performance and implement preventive maintenance measures
	Respond promptly to service requests and incidents, ensuring high levels of user satisfaction
	Collaborate with vendors and third-party service providers when required
	Maintain accurate documentation of issues, resolutions, and system configurations


Requirements


	OND in Information Technology, Computer Science or other related discipline.
	2&ndash;4 years of IT support experience, preferably in the hospitality industry
	Strong knowledge of Windows OS, networking fundamentals, and common IT systems
	Familiarity with hospitality software (e.g., PMS, POS systems) is highly desirable
	Excellent troubleshooting and analytical skills
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays if required


Preferred Skills:


	Experience with cloud-based systems and virtualization
	IT certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft certifications) are an advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunity to work in a dynamic hospitality environment
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.


Method of Application

	Maintain and troubleshoot Property Management Systems (PMS), POS systems, and guest-facing technologies

	2–4 years of IT support experience, preferably in the hospitality industry
	Strong knowledge of Windows OS, networking fundamentals, and common IT systems
	Familiarity with hospitality software (e.g., PMS, POS systems) is highly desirable
	Excellent troubleshooting and analytical skills
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Manager I",
  "description": "Dangote Group is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s most diversified business conglomerates with a hard &ndash; earned reputation for excellent business practices and products&rsquo; quality with its operational headquarters in the bustling metropolis of Lagos, Nigeria in West Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Service Manager I

Job Location:&nbsp;Dangote Cement I Coast

Job Description&nbsp;


	Manage customer relations by ensuring consistent quality in service delivery, customer satisfaction and, ultimately, customer loyalty.


Key Activities and Responsibilities


	Develop and lead the implementation of customer relations programmes or initiatives, including through operations with approved call centres.
	Develop dashboards and conduct periodic monitoring to ensure that customer relationship objectives are being met.
	Establish an effective system to ensure the prompt resolution of customer complaints or enquiries.
	Liaise with area managers to obtain and provide customer information.
	Conduct periodic customer surveys and communicate the results to the sales team and management.
	Coordinate the provision of information on customer concerns to area managers in the relevant areas and follow up to ensure resolution and customer satisfaction.
	Obtain qualitative and quantitative studies from specialist firms when necessary to improve Dangote Cement Senegal&#39;s customer service delivery.
	Perform any other tasks assigned as deemed necessary by the Sales Department.


Key Requirements
Qualifications and Professional Experience:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or equivalent in Marketing, Social Sciences or a similar discipline.
	Minimum of seven (7) years of experience, including at least two (2) years in a managerial position.
	Postgraduate degree
	Certification in customer management would be an added advantage


Skills and Competencies:


	A thorough understanding of trends, challenges, opportunities, regulations and legislation relating to the cement manufacturing industry.
	In-depth knowledge of Dangote&#39;s product and service offering.
	Thorough knowledge of customer relationship concepts, techniques and methodologies.
	Thorough knowledge of market/customer segmentation methodologies.
	Very good leadership and people management skills.
	Strong negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Very good communication, presentation and facilitation skills.
	Strong customer focus.
	High sense of responsibility.

Customer Service Manager I Job at Dangote Group




        
    

        
        Dangote Group is one of Nigeria’s most diversified business conglomerates with a hard – earned reputation for excellent business practices and products’ quality with its operational headquarters in the bustling metropolis of Lagos, Nigeria in West Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Manager I

Job Location: Dangote Cement I Coast

Job Description 


	Manage customer relations by ensuring consistent quality in service delivery, customer satisfaction and, ultimately, customer loyalty.


Key Activities and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and lead the implementation of customer relations programmes or initiatives, including through operations with approved call centres.
	Develop dashboards and conduct periodic monitoring to ensure that customer relationship objectives are being met.
	Establish an effective system to ensure the prompt resolution of customer complaints or enquiries.
	Liaise with area managers to obtain and provide customer information.
	Conduct periodic customer surveys and communicate the results to the sales team and management.
	Coordinate the provision of information on customer concerns to area managers in the relevant areas and follow up to ensure resolution and customer satisfaction.
	Obtain qualitative and quantitative studies from specialist firms when necessary to improve Dangote Cement Senegal's customer service delivery.
	Perform any other tasks assigned as deemed necessary by the Sales Department.


Key Requirements
Qualifications and Professional Experience:


	Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in Marketing, Social Sciences or a similar discipline.
	Minimum of seven (7) years of experience, including at least two (2) years in a managerial position.
	Postgraduate degree
	Certification in customer management would be an added advantage


Skills and Competencies:


	A thorough understanding of trends, challenges, opportunities, regulations and legislation relating to the cement manufacturing industry.
	In-depth knowledge of Dangote's product and service offering.
	Thorough knowledge of customer relationship concepts, techniques and methodologies.
	Thorough knowledge of market/customer segmentation methodologies.
	Very good leadership and people management skills.
	Strong negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Very good communication, presentation and facilitation skills.
	Strong customer focus.
	High sense of responsibility.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
